calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Continued To Jun-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Larry Lee appeared in person for Thomas Wei (petitioner).

The Court requested counsel to file a new petition for final distribution since they discovered the two children. Counsel to file papers two weeks prior to the next hearing date. The matter is continued to June 30, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Fajardo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Continued To Apr-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Continued To Apr-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Larry Lee for administrator Thomas Mei (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the Petition for Final Distribution.

Mr. Lee requested a continuance to allow additional time to work with the probate referee. He stated that a new probate referee, Amy Harrington, had been appointed. The Court discussed the current delays involving probate referees and determined that additional time was appropriate.

The Court continued the matter to April 7, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Continued To Jan-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Larry Lee for administrator Thomas Mei (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding notes from the Probate Examiner that remain outstanding. Mr. Lee requested a further continuance to address the deficiencies. Mr. Lee also noted the examiner's indication that a new probate referee would be required. The Court confirmed that the assigned probate referee, Isidoor Bornstein, had passed away and that an order appointing a new referee will be necessary.

The Court inquired as to the minor beneficiary Gwen's age, and counsel confirmed she will turn 18 on May 16, 2026.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to January 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
